pull_request.title: feat: propagate full routing config into spawned child sessions
pull_request.body:
## Summary

Fixes the routing matrix fallback chain not being propagated into child sessions when spawning via `delegate()`.

## Changes

- `session.py:spawn()` now deep-copies the full routing config into the child session config rather than only passing the resolved model
- Added test coverage for fallback chain propagation

## Affected repos

- `microsoft/amplifier-core` (this PR)

## Testing

Ran the existing routing matrix test suite — all passing.
